---
title: "Prompt / Model Comparison"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
editor: source
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)
library(DBI)
library(knitr)

query_postgres <- function(query, ...) {
  con <- DBI::dbConnect(
    RPostgres::Postgres(),
    host     = Sys.getenv("DB_HOST"),
    port     = as.integer(Sys.getenv("DB_PORT")),
    user     = Sys.getenv("DB_USER"),
    password = Sys.getenv("DB_PASSWORD"),
    dbname   = "mtgcards"
  )
  df <- DBI::dbGetQuery(con, query, ...)
  DBI::dbDisconnect(con)
  tibble::tibble(df)
}
```

```{r data}
veggies <- c("ramp", "card_advantage", "targeted_disruption", "mass_disruption")

# Single-pass results
df_single <- query_postgres("SELECT card_name, prompt_file, model, raw_json FROM public.labeled")

# Two-pass results — expose pass1 and final as separate rows with model suffixes
df_two_pass_raw <- query_postgres("
  SELECT card_name, prompt_file, model, raw_json_pass1, raw_json_final
  FROM public.labeled_two_pass
")
df_two_pass_p1 <- df_two_pass_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(raw_json_pass1)) %>%
  transmute(card_name, prompt_file, model = paste0(model, " [p1]"), raw_json = raw_json_pass1)
df_two_pass_final <- df_two_pass_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(raw_json_final)) %>%
  transmute(card_name, prompt_file, model = paste0(model, " [final]"), raw_json = raw_json_final)

df_all_claude <- bind_rows(df_single, df_two_pass_p1, df_two_pass_final) %>%
  filter(basename(prompt_file) == "prompt.md" | coalesce(as.integer(str_extract(basename(prompt_file), "\\d+")), 0L) >= 8)

df_kf <- query_postgres("SELECT card_name, kf FROM public.labeled_kf_final")
df_kf_tags <- df_kf %>%
  mutate(kf = map(as.character(kf), fromJSON)) %>%
  unnest_longer(kf, indices_to = "category", values_to = "tier")
kf_card_names <- unique(df_kf$card_name)

# Unnest all Claude tags, keeping prompt_file + model
df_all_tags <- df_all_claude %>%
  mutate(raw_json = map(as.character(raw_json), fromJSON)) %>%
  unnest_longer(raw_json, indices_to = "category", values_to = "tier") %>%
  filter(!category %in% c("card_name", "low_confidence")) %>%
  select(card_name, prompt_file, model, category, tier)

# Cards present in every combo AND in KF labels — fixed baseline for all comparisons
universal_cards <- df_all_tags %>%
  group_by(prompt_file, model) %>%
  summarise(cards = list(unique(card_name)), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pull(cards) %>%
  reduce(intersect) %>%
  intersect(kf_card_names)

# Compute metrics per combo
results <- df_all_tags %>%
  group_by(prompt_file, model) %>%
  group_modify(function(df, keys) {
    shared_cards <- universal_cards

    df_tags <- df %>%
      filter(card_name %in% shared_cards) %>%
      full_join(
        df_kf_tags %>% filter(card_name %in% shared_cards),
        by = c("card_name", "category"),
        suffix = c("_claude", "_kf")
      ) 

    df_v <- df_tags %>% filter(category %in% veggies)

    tibble(
      n_cards          = length(shared_cards),
      tag_acc_overall  = mean(is.na(df_tags$tier_kf) == is.na(df_tags$tier_claude)),
      tag_acc_veggies  = mean(is.na(df_v$tier_kf)    == is.na(df_v$tier_claude)),
      tier_acc_overall = mean(df_tags$tier_kf == df_tags$tier_claude, na.rm = TRUE),
      tier_acc_veggies = mean(df_v$tier_kf    == df_v$tier_claude,    na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(prompt = tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(prompt_file)), .before = model) %>%
  select(-prompt_file) %>%
  arrange(prompt, model)
```

**Tag accuracy**: among all (card, mechanic) pairs where at least one of Claude or KF assigned a tag, what fraction did both agree on?
**Tier accuracy**: among pairs where both agreed a mechanic applies, what fraction matched on tier?
"Veggies" = ramp, card_advantage, targeted_disruption, mass_disruption.

```{r table}
results %>%
  mutate(across(c(tag_acc_overall, tag_acc_veggies, tier_acc_overall, tier_acc_veggies),
                ~ paste0(round(. * 100, 1), "%"))) %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("Prompt", "Model", "Cards",
                  "Tag Acc (Overall)", "Tag Acc (Veggies)",
                  "Tier Acc (Overall)", "Tier Acc (Veggies)"),
    align = c("l", "l", "r", "r", "r", "r", "r")
  )
```
